'''Lankashiir''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="ACPOV" /> of the [[Lankashiir system/Legends|Lankashiir system]], which was located along the [[Quellor Run/Legends|Quellor Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] within the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]<ref name="Atlas" /> and [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] regions of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Region" /> During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]], Lankashiir was under the [[Imperial Space|control]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. A planet thriving with [[Tree/Legends|forests]], Lankashiir was home to [[Adion Lang]], a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] serving with the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]], and the [[Durasha family]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] family with strong Imperial ties.<ref name="ACPOV" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lankashiir was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 8|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 8]]{{'s}} short story "[[A Certain Point of View (short story)|A Certain Point of View]]," which was written by [[Charlene Newcomb]] and published on [[November 1]], [[1995]].<ref name="ACPOV" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the world in grid square N-11.<ref name="Atlas" />
